title: Chikungunya - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about chikungunya, its causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the cause of chikungunya, how it is spread and where it is found.
Learn about the symptoms, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how chikungunya is diagnosed and treated.
Learn how chikungunya can be prevented.
Discover how chikungunya is monitored.

### For health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
